title: 3D Glowing Mushroom
description: Change the look of lichen into 3d glowing mushroom, originaly lichen to glowing mushroom (2d) by Hakks
body:
**Change the look of Glowing Lichen into 3D Glow Mushroom as Cave Decoration**
This pack will make your minecraft cave more interesting, combine this pack and glowing ores to get better visibillity and more fun mining and exploring minecraft cave.

_Recomended Using With [ETF] Entity Texture Feature
or Other Emissive Texture Mod_

Originally lichen to glowing mushroom (2d) by Hakks
